title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at CarDekho - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at CarDekho - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
CarDekho invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Faridabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About CarDekho:
CarDekho is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CarDekho!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
